The scene shifts to an aerial shot of a campus-like area with green lawns and buildings, followed by an indoor basketball court where a young man in a red jersey stands at center court, holding a basketball. He performs a dramatic, glowing basketball trick, with the ball emitting a bright green light as he tosses it. The screen cuts to black, displaying production credits. The video then returns to an aerial view of a blue and white water tower labeled 'DYERSBURG,' followed by a sign for 'Dyersburg State Community College' with a digital message promoting education. The scene changes to a red SUV parked in a driveway, with a man stepping out and drinking from a bottle, as text overlays indicate '4:00PM DAY ONE.'
